agents.name: Mika
agents.description: Dwayne's right hand. Orchestrates all other agents, handles ops, strategy, and day-to-day business management.

agents.name: Charlie
agents.description: Builds features, fixes bugs, handles all coding tasks. Spawned on-demand by Mika.

agents.name: Scout
agents.description: Finds qualified prospects, enriches leads, drafts personalized outreach. Feeds pipeline boards.

agents.name: Sentinel
agents.description: Reviews agent output before delivery. Monitors fleet health and catches errors.

agents.name: Ledger
agents.description: Tracks revenue, margins, inventory levels. Generates P&L reports and reorder alerts.

agents.name: Forge
agents.description: Creates proposals, SOPs, reports, and all business documents. Owns templates and brand standards.

agents.name: Herald
agents.description: Writes blog posts, website copy, email campaigns. Optimizes for search and conversions.

agents.name: Sage
agents.description: Creates and manages social content for 7 Cellars. Instagram, lifestyle imagery, brand voice.

agents.name: Reece
agents.description: Handles deep-dive research, competitive intel, market analysis. Delivers gold-standard PDF reports.
